heading: Supervision—(Rule)
label: 3739 Supervision—(Rule)
notes: See Federal Rules of Criminal ProcedureControl and supervision in appellate court, Rule 39(a).

References in TextRule 39 of the Federal Rules of Criminal Procedure was abrogated , eff. , and is covered by Rule 27, Federal Rules of Appellate Procedure, set out in the Appendix to Title 28, Judiciary and Judicial Procedure.Dec. 4, 1967July 1, 1968
